concepts.name: Chain-of-Thought
concepts.summary: Spelling out reasoning steps in the prompt for harder tasks—a core prompting technique that later showed up in agents and tool use.

concepts.name: ReAct
concepts.summary: Interleaving reasoning traces with tool calls—the pattern that linked chat-style prompts to actionable apps.

concepts.name: Prompt Engineering
concepts.summary: Crafting prompts to steer model behavior—a defining builder skill in 2023, later partly absorbed by context engineering.

concepts.name: Context Engineering
concepts.summary: Designing everything in the context window—system prompts, tools, memory, and retrieved content—not just the user message.

concepts.name: RAG
concepts.summary: Retrieve-then-generate for grounding on private data—the default enterprise app pattern in 2023, later debated against longer context and agents.

concepts.name: GraphRAG
concepts.summary: Graph structure and community summaries on top of RAG for complex corpora—Microsoft’s term for knowledge-heavy deployments.

concepts.name: Vector Database
concepts.summary: Pinecone, Weaviate, Chroma, and peers surged with the RAG boom, then cooled as the market consolidated.

concepts.name: Tool Use
concepts.summary: Structured tool and function calls that let models hit APIs and databases—the bridge from chat to action.

concepts.name: MCP
concepts.summary: Model Context Protocol—an open standard for plugging models into tools and data, often called USB-C for AI.

concepts.name: A2A
concepts.summary: Agent2Agent protocol for discovery and task handoff between agents—complements MCP’s model-to-tool layer.

concepts.name: Skills
concepts.summary: Packaged agent capabilities—instructions, scripts, and resources loaded on demand (e.g. Claude Skills, agentskills.io)—as a composable layer above raw tool calls.

concepts.name: Agent Harness
concepts.summary: Repeatable runtimes for models, tools, and environments—with tracing and eval hooks—from OSS scaffolds to IDE loops.

concepts.name: Chatbot
concepts.summary: Consumer chat apps after ChatGPT—turning LLMs into products and fixing the chat box as the default UI.

concepts.name: LLM Agent
concepts.summary: Product narrative from 2024 on: apps where the model plans, calls tools, and completes multi-step work autonomously.

concepts.name: Copilot
concepts.summary: Inline assistants in IDEs, Office, and browsers—GitHub Copilot and Microsoft Copilot popularized the copilot UX.

concepts.name: Deep Research
concepts.summary: Long-running search, reading, and synthesis into reports—productized by OpenAI, Google, and others.

concepts.name: Vibe Coding
concepts.summary: Describing software in natural language and iterating fast—celebrated for speed, questioned on reliability.
